name: Moxies Inc Which Will Do Bus
notes: LIKELY NOT A SCHOOL-BUS OPERATOR. The 'Which Will Do Bus' suffix is the truncation of a CA SOS-style foreign-entity name pattern: 'WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS [DBA]' — used when a foreign (out-of-state) corporation must adopt an alternate name to register in California. Same pattern confirmed for sibling row 'Sparrows Inc Which Will Do Bus' (Palo Alto), which CA SOS lists as 'SPARROWS, INC. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS SPARROWS ONLINE, INC.' (entity C4621755, Delaware foreign stock, registered 7/24/2020) — a tech entity, not a bus carrier. No FMCSA SAFER record for 'MOXIES' or 'MOXIES INC'. No CA SOS record reachable via free fetch; recommend manual BizFile lookup. Address 730 Colusa Ave, El Cerrito is associated in third-party records with 'Matin Group LLC'. This row should be flagged as a likely false positive in the underlying source list.
